calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Continued To May-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Default Prove Up Hearing; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Cheryl J. Cotterill, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff Alexander Anolik et al.
Plaintiff Witness Alexander Anolik, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants Bharat Patel aka Barry Patel aka Cortez Patel and David Firestone aka David Firerstone as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,850.00
Attorney's Fees - $2,750.00
Costs - $410.00
Punitive - $298,500.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $331,510.00
Counsel to prepare judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

2 p.m.
Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Continued To Feb-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
